author: ralexstokes
content: Going to experiment with handling this week's call async with a discussion thread here for the relevant agenda items.

author: potuz
content: I completely agree with reducing ACD, I'm not so sure about ACDC in particular given that any removal means a month between two calls. Anyway. Precisely this Thursday seems a bit off because ePBS devnet zero will launch Wednesday. I support anyways moving in general to more async calls on governance and moving to more sync smaller technical calls

author: ralexstokes
content: yeah i think we can make it work this week, and worst case we can chat Monday during ACDT. there's also a more general question of how we split b/t ACD{T,C,E} currently and if we should load balance differently but that's a different conversation

content: i'm working on some notes on the agenda as a prompt for discussion i'll share here shortly
